name: EAST WEST BANCORP INC
business: East West Bancorp is a bank holding company that provides commercial and consumer banking services. It focuses on the Asian American community and cross-border business between the U.S. and Asia. The company operates over 110 locations in the U.S. and Asia.
sellsTo: Companies operating in U.S. and Asia

exposures.sentence: The integration of digital with brick-and-mortar channels has been an area of investment for the Bank, for both commercial and consumer banking.

We have developed mobile and online banking platforms, which are continually enhanced to enrich our customer s user experience, and which offer a full suite of banking services tailored to our customers unique needs.

The financial services industry is continuously undergoing rapid technological change with frequent introductions of new technology-driven products and services, including recent rapid developments in artificial intelligence.
The enactment of the GENIUS Act in July 2025 has the potential to accelerate stablecoin adoption.
we and other regional banks are increasingly partnering with fintech and other providers to distribute or market our products and services.

A cyber-attack, information or security breach, or failure of our operational or security systems or infrastructure, or those of third-party vendors, could disrupt our business, and adversely impact our results of operations, financial condition, cash flows, and liquidity, as well as damage our reputation.
We invest in certain tax-advantaged investments that support qualified affordable housing projects, community development, and renewable energy resources.
